case_title: ADKISSON, CHARLES vs. CAHILL, THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAHILL, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 418 VICTORIA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
